name: 天照回合结算
description: 每回合结束时，站在天照格子上的所有棋子附加一层天照效果；当前结束回合的玩家的棋子受到天照每层2点伤害
skillCode: if (!battle.extensions || !battle.extensions.amaterasuCells || battle.extensions.amaterasuCells.length === 0) return { success: false, message: '' }; var currentPlayerId = battle.turn.currentPlayerId; var amaterasuOwnerPlayerId = battle.extensions.amaterasuOwnerPlayerId || null; var msgs = []; var allAlivePieces = battle.pieces.filter(function(p) { return p.currentHp > 0; }); allAlivePieces.forEach(function(p) { var isOn = battle.extensions.amaterasuCells.some(function(c) { return c.x === p.x && c.y === p.y; }); if (!isOn) return; var tag = p.statusTags && p.statusTags.find(function(t) { return t.type === 'amaterasu-burn'; }); if (tag) { tag.stacks = (tag.stacks || 1) + 1; msgs.push(p.name + '站在天照上，层数加深至' + tag.stacks + '层'); } else { addStatusEffectById(p.instanceId, { id: 'amaterasu-burn-' + p.instanceId, name: '天照灼烧', type: 'amaterasu-burn', currentDuration: -1, currentUses: -1, intensity: 2, stacks: 1 }); msgs.push(p.name + '站在天照上，获得1层天照效果'); } }); var myPieces = battle.pieces.filter(function(p) { return p.currentHp > 0 && p.ownerPlayerId === currentPlayerId; }); myPieces.forEach(function(p) { var tag = p.statusTags && p.statusTags.find(function(t) { return t.type === 'amaterasu-burn'; }); if (!tag) return; var stacks = tag.stacks || 1; var dmg = 2 * stacks; dealDamage(p, p, dmg, 'true', battle, 'amaterasu-burn-tick', false, amaterasuOwnerPlayerId); msgs.push(p.name + '受天照灼烧(' + stacks + '层)，失去' + dmg + '点生命值'); }); if (msgs.length === 0) return { success: false, message: '' }; return { success: true, message: msgs.join('；') };
